task:

Build a formatted text layout in /home/user/Documents/formatted_text.svg with these exact contents:
- A text element near the top of the page with the exact content `Title Text` and font size 48px.
- A divider rectangle below the title with id `divider`, width 600, height 4, and fill #888888.
- A second text element below the divider with the exact content: Body paragraph for the document layout.

The page must remain 800x400. Save the file in place.
